'''Llitishi''' was a [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the leader of one of the [[Cestus Cybernetics]] Families during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. His particular family was descended from the son of a murderer and the daughter of an ore miner.

Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and the [[Vippit]] [[Doolb Snoil]] managed to make the Regent give up trusting the Families. Finally, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] cruiser [[Nexu (starship)|''Nexu'']] bombed the bunker where Llitishi and many members of the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Five Families]] were killed in the blast.
